== PlantUML Cheatsheet

*LocalLeader* = `,` in PlantUML buffers

→ Back to xref:cheatsheets/index.adoc[main cheatsheet] · Full guide:
../guides/diagrams.md

=== Preview

[width="100%",cols="34%,33%,33%",options="header",]
|===
|Keys |Mode |Action
|`,p` |Normal |Render and open diagram in browser (`PumlPreview`)

|`++<++leader++>++pa` |Normal |Open ASCII preview popup
(`PumlPreviewAscii`)
|===

=== User Command

[width="100%",cols="50%,50%",options="header",]
|===
|Command |Description
|`:PumlPreview` |Encode the current buffer and open it in the PlantUML
Docker server

|`:PumlPreviewAscii` |Encode the current buffer and show ASCII preview
in a floating popup
|===

The command reads the buffer, encodes it using PlantUML’s deflate {plus}
base64 scheme via `python3`, then opens the result at
`http://localhost:8080/png/++<++encoded++>++` using the first available
browser opener (`xdg-open` on Linux, `open` on macOS, `wslview` or
`explorer.exe` on WSL).

=== Prerequisites

The PlantUML Docker server must be running before using `:PumlPreview`:

[source,sh]
----
docker compose -f ~/.config/nvim/docker/plantuml-server/docker-compose.yml up -d
----

'''''

_Keymaps defined in `after/ftplugin/plantuml.lua`. `:PumlPreview` and
`:PumlPreviewAscii` commands defined in `lua/plugins/plantuml.lua`._
